PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: birthday party
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: a birthday the colony gathered to mark; write the warmth of the day and what it meant to stop and celebrate here, not a guest list

instructions.li: birthday - write the small brightness of it, and how it sat against everything else the colony is carrying
birthday - keep it to a believable moment for this pawn; a hard place makes a little celebration matter more, not less

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: gladness with the ordinary weight of the day still underneath

tones.li: warm and a little tired, a real celebration snatched from a hard place
fond and low-key, glad the colony made the time

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: funeral
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: a funeral the colony held; write the grief and the standing-together of it — what was lost and how the pawn carried it — not the ceremony's mechanics

instructions.li: funeral - write the weight of the gathering and the pawn's own private grief, only as far as their mood and the moment make believable
funeral - it is a shared loss; let the presence of the others matter, whether it was comfort or made it heavier

tones.li: subdued and raw, grief held among others
still and heavy, the colony closing around a loss
